---
title: "Inspections_Analysis"
author: "Jeff Goetz, MS"
date: "2026-06-05"
output: word_document
---

## Load appropriate libraries

```{r setup, results=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(lme4)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
```

## Load and clean dataset


```{r}
dat <- suppressMessages(
  read_excel("InspectionsAdhocReport.xlsx", sheet = "V2")
) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(-x21, -x164, -x23) %>%
  mutate(
    facility_id = as.factor(facility_id),
    violation = as.factor(violation),
    inspection_begin_date = as.Date(inspection_begin_date, format = "%m/%d/%Y"),
    risk = as.factor(risk),
    square_footage = as.factor(square_footage),
    region = as.factor(region),
    est_type = as.factor(est_type)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    violation = relevel(violation, ref = "No"),
    risk = relevel(risk, ref = "LOW"),
    square_footage = relevel(square_footage, ref = "0 - 1,000"),
    region = relevel(region, ref = "253"),
    year = format(inspection_begin_date, "%Y"),
    year = as.factor(year)
  )
```

## Build mixed-effects logistic-regression model

```{r main-model, results=FALSE}
#final mixed-effects logistic regression model
mod_main <- glmer(
  violation ~ risk + region + square_footage + (1 | facility_id),
  family = binomial,
  data = dat,
  control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
)

summary(mod_main)
```


```{r}
#get coefficients and Wald confidence intervals
coef_tab <- summary(mod_main)$coefficients
ci_tab <- confint(mod_main, parm = "beta_", method = "Wald")

#create main regression table
tbl_main_model <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coef_tab),
  OR = exp(coef_tab[, "Estimate"]),
  CI_low = exp(ci_tab[, 1]),
  CI_high = exp(ci_tab[, 2]),
  p_value = coef_tab[, "Pr(>|z|)"],
  row.names = NULL
) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    term = recode(
      term,
      "riskHIGH" = "Risk: High vs Low",
      "riskMEDIUM" = "Risk: Medium vs Low",
      "region251" = "Region 251 vs 253",
      "region252" = "Region 252 vs 253",
      "region254" = "Region 254 vs 253",
      "region255" = "Region 255 vs 253",
      "region257" = "Region 257 vs 253",
      "square_footage1,001 - 5,000" = "Square footage: 1,001 - 5,000 vs 0 - 1,000",
      "square_footage150,001 +" = "Square footage: 150,001 + vs 0 - 1,000",
      "square_footage20,001 - 40,000" = "Square footage: 20,001 - 40,000 vs 0 - 1,000",
      "square_footage40,001 - 80,000" = "Square footage: 40,001 - 80,000 vs 0 - 1,000",
      "square_footage5,001 - 20,000" = "Square footage: 5,001 - 20,000 vs 0 - 1,000",
      "square_footage80,001 -150,000" = "Square footage: 80,001 -150,000 vs 0 - 1,000",
      "square_footageN/A" = "Square footage: N/A vs 0 - 1,000"
    ),
    OR = round(OR, 2),
    CI_low = round(CI_low, 2),
    CI_high = round(CI_high, 2),
    p_value = round(p_value, 4),
    `95% CI` = paste0("(", CI_low, ", ", CI_high, ")")
  )

tbl_main_model %>%
  select(term, OR, `95% CI`, p_value)

ggplot(
  tbl_main_model %>% filter(p_value < 0.05),
  aes(x = OR, y = reorder(term, OR))
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = CI_low, xmax = CI_high), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Significant predictors of reported violations",
    x = "Odds ratio (95% CI)",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```



## Descriptive summaries

```{r}
#overall inspection and violation summary
overall_tab <- dat %>%
  summarize(
    total_inspections = n(),
    violations = sum(violation == "Yes"),
    no_violations = sum(violation == "No"),
    pct_violations = round(100 * mean(violation == "Yes"), 1)
  )

overall_tab

#Table 1: risk
tab1_risk_wide <- dat %>%
  group_by(risk, violation) %>%
  summarize(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = violation, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    Total = No + Yes,
    `No violation` = paste0(No, " (", round(100 * No / Total, 1), "%)"),
    `Violation` = paste0(Yes, " (", round(100 * Yes / Total, 1), "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(risk, Total, `No violation`, Violation)

tab1_risk_wide

#Table 1: region
tab1_region_wide <- dat %>%
  group_by(region, violation) %>%
  summarize(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = violation, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    Total = No + Yes,
    `No violation` = paste0(No, " (", round(100 * No / Total, 1), "%)"),
    `Violation` = paste0(Yes, " (", round(100 * Yes / Total, 1), "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(region, Total, `No violation`, Violation)

tab1_region_wide

#Table 1: square footage
tab1_sqft_wide <- dat %>%
  group_by(square_footage, violation) %>%
  summarize(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = violation, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    Total = No + Yes,
    `No violation` = paste0(No, " (", round(100 * No / Total, 1), "%)"),
    `Violation` = paste0(Yes, " (", round(100 * Yes / Total, 1), "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(square_footage, Total, `No violation`, Violation)

tab1_sqft_wide

#facility repeat summary
facility_freq <- dat %>%
  count(facility_id, name = "n_inspections")

facility_summary <- facility_freq %>%
  summarize(
    n_facilities = n(),
    singletons = sum(n_inspections == 1),
    repeated_2plus = sum(n_inspections >= 2),
    max_inspections = max(n_inspections),
    mean_inspections = round(mean(n_inspections), 2)
  )

facility_summary
```


## Exploratory subgroup analysis

```{r}
#create High- and Medium-risk subsets
dat_hm <- dat %>%
  filter(risk %in% c("HIGH", "MEDIUM")) %>%
  filter(est_type != "0") %>%
  droplevels()

dat_high <- dat_hm %>%
  filter(risk == "HIGH") %>%
  droplevels()

dat_med <- dat_hm %>%
  filter(risk == "MEDIUM") %>%
  droplevels()
```

## High-risk facilities

```{r}
#summarize establishment type within High-risk facilities
tab_high <- dat_high %>%
  group_by(est_type) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    violations = sum(violation == "Yes"),
    prop_violation = round(mean(violation == "Yes"), 4),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(prop_violation))

tab_high

ggplot(tab_high, aes(x = reorder(est_type, prop_violation), y = prop_violation)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("n=", n)), hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  expand_limits(y = max(tab_high$prop_violation) + 0.05) +
  labs(
    title = "Violation rate by establishment type within High-risk facilities",
    x = "Establishment type",
    y = "Proportion with violation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Medium-risk facilities

```{r}
#summarize establishment type within Medium-risk facilities
tab_med <- dat_med %>%
  group_by(est_type) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    violations = sum(violation == "Yes"),
    prop_violation = round(mean(violation == "Yes"), 4),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(prop_violation))

tab_med

ggplot(tab_med, aes(x = reorder(est_type, prop_violation), y = prop_violation)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("n=", n)), hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  expand_limits(y = max(tab_med$prop_violation) + 0.05) +
  labs(
    title = "Violation rate by establishment type within Medium-risk facilities",
    x = "Establishment type",
    y = "Proportion with violation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


## Year-over-year summary

```{r}
tab_year <- dat %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    inspections = n(),
    violations = sum(violation == "Yes"),
    pct_violations = round(100 * mean(violation == "Yes"), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

tab_year


tab_year_risk <- dat %>%
  group_by(year, risk) %>%
  summarize(
    inspections = n(),
    violations = sum(violation == "Yes"),
    pct_violations = round(100 * mean(violation == "Yes"), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

tab_year_risk

tab_year_risk <- tab_year_risk %>%
  mutate(
    risk = factor(risk, levels = c("HIGH", "MEDIUM", "LOW"))
  )



ggplot(tab_year_risk, aes(x = year, y = pct_violations, color = risk, group = risk)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 30),
    labels = label_percent(scale = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Reported violation rates were highest in 2023 among High- and Medium-risk facilities",
    subtitle = "Annual percentage of inspections resulting in a reported violation, by risk level",
    x = "Inspection year",
    y = "Violation rate",
    color = "Risk level"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
tab_year_est_high <- dat %>%
  filter(risk == "HIGH", est_type != "0") %>%
  group_by(year, est_type) %>%
  summarize(inspections = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(pct_of_year = round(100 * inspections / sum(inspections), 1))

tab_year_est_high

tab_year_est_med <- dat %>%
  filter(risk == "MEDIUM", est_type != "0") %>%
  group_by(year, est_type) %>%
  summarize(inspections = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(pct_of_year = round(100 * inspections / sum(inspections), 1))

tab_year_est_med
```
